reasons: Tigreal can group enemies so X.Borg can apply Fire Missiles pressure and threaten Last Insanity in a clear AoE window.
X.Borg benefits from enemies being held in place while he commits his explosive damage.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates a grouped control window, while X.Borg follows with sustained AoE pressure and Last Insanity threat.
worksBestWhen: X.Borg has Firaga Armor before committing.
Tigreal confirms the engage before X.Borg spends Last Insanity.
failureCases: X.Borg dives before enemies are controlled.
X.Borg loses Firaga Armor before the setup is ready.
The enemy spreads before Last Insanity connects.

reasons: Atlas can pull enemies into one place, giving X.Borg a stronger Last Insanity detonation target.
The grouped engage lets X.Borg apply AoE pressure to several enemies at once.

proof.summary: Atlas compresses the enemy formation, and X.Borg punishes the formation with AoE true-damage pressure.
worksBestWhen: X.Borg has Firaga Armor and ultimate ready.
Atlas catches multiple targets before X.Borg commits.
failureCases: X.Borg enters after the control window ends.
Atlas catches targets outside X.Borg's reach.
The enemy forces X.Borg into Armorless State before he can commit.

reasons: Carmilla's linked-target setup increases the value of X.Borg's area pressure when enemies stay close.
X.Borg can keep burning and zoning linked enemies during a clustered teamfight.

proof.summary: Carmilla links enemies in a fight, while X.Borg adds repeated AoE pressure and detonation threat.
worksBestWhen: Carmilla confirms the link before X.Borg commits forward.
X.Borg keeps enemies in the burn zone long enough to pressure them.
failureCases: The enemy breaks the link quickly.
X.Borg cannot reach the linked enemies.
X.Borg loses armor before the fight becomes grouped.

reasons: Angela can support X.Borg when he commits with Firaga Armor, helping him survive long enough to finish his damage cycle.
The attached support improves X.Borg's ability to stay inside the fight after engaging.

proof.summary: X.Borg's engage depends on surviving the commit window, and Angela adds protection and movement support.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before X.Borg is forced into Armorless State.
X.Borg enters when his armor and ultimate are available.
failureCases: X.Borg wastes Last Insanity into mobile targets.
Angela attaches after X.Borg has already been forced out.

reasons: Floryn's global heal helps X.Borg survive after armor loss or during extended objective fights.
X.Borg can keep pressuring fights while receiving support from a safe distance.

proof.summary: X.Borg often plays extended fights around his armor state, and Floryn can stabilize him globally.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves Bloom for the moment X.Borg is focused.
X.Borg still has enough distance or armor state to keep fighting after the heal.
failureCases: X.Borg is burst down during the armorless window.
Floryn heals before the enemy commits damage.
